description: High-level project boundaries for clean architecture and UI clients.

domain.responsibility: Core business entities, value objects, domain rules, and domain events.

application.responsibility: Use cases, orchestration, interfaces, and application services.

infrastructure.responsibility: Persistence, external integrations, and infrastructure implementations.

api.responsibility: HTTP host, controllers/endpoints, middleware, and transport mapping.

contracts.responsibility: Shared request/response contracts and cross-client DTO definitions.

web_portal.responsibility: Customer Care and Management web experiences.

mobile_app.responsibility: Unified mobile client covering Customer and Worker experiences.
